languages.text: "Железный монкай и его механизм-пустышка мне наскучили. Я продемонстрирую свое превосходство и соберу его обратно мучительно медленно, чтобы он каждый момент осознавал, что его жизнь и смерть зависят лишь от меня. Пожалуй, это будет слаще любых пресмыканий, которые он мог бы продемонстрировать".

"That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."
languages.original_text: "Железный монкай и его механизм-пустышка мне наскучили. Я продемонстрирую свое превосходство и соберу его обратно мучительно медленно, чтобы он каждый момент осознавал, что его жизнь и смерть зависят лишь от меня. Пожалуй, это будет слаще любых пресмыканий, которые он мог бы продемонстрировать".

traits.locale_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating care, so that every second, he understands his existence is a gift I can revoke. A far more exquisite pleasure than his pathetic snivelling I could potentially witness."

languages.text: "Dieser eiserne Chem-Pan-Sey mit seinem nutzlosen Spielzeug ist ermüdend. Um meine Meisterschaft zu beweisen, werde ich ihn mit akribischer Genauigkeit wieder zusammensetzen, damit er jede Sekunde, in der er seine Existenz versteht, mir verdankt. Das dürfte mir weit mehr Freude bereiten, als sein jämmerliches Geheule."
languages.original_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser eiserne Chem-Pan-Sey mit seinem nutzlosen Spielzeug ist ermüdend. Um meine Meisterschaft zu beweisen, werde ich ihn mit akribischer Genauigkeit wieder zusammensetzen, damit er jede Sekunde, in der er seine Existenz versteht, mir verdankt. Das dürfte mir weit mehr Freude bereiten, als sein jämmerliches Geheule."

languages.text: « Ce mon-keigh en fer et sa babiole commencent à me lasser. Pour prouver mon talent, je vais le réassembler avec une attention méticuleuse, afin que chaque seconde de souffrance lui rappelle que son existence est un privilège que je peux révoquer à ma guise. Cela devrait m'apporter bien plus de plaisir que d'écouter votre pitoyable plaidoyer. »
languages.original_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."

traits.locale_text: « Ce mon-keigh en fer et sa babiole commencent à me lasser. Pour prouver mon talent, je vais le réassembler avec une attention méticuleuse, afin que chaque seconde de souffrance lui rappelle que son existence est un privilège que je peux révoquer à ma guise. Cela devrait m'apporter bien plus de plaisir que d'écouter votre pitoyable plaidoyer. »

languages.text: «El mon-keigh de hierro y su aparato inútil me han aburrido. Para demostrar mi maestría, lo reconstruiré con tanta minuciosidad que entenderá a cada segundo que pasa que su existencia es un privilegio que le puedo arrebatar. Un placer mucho más exquisito para mí que sus patéticos gimoteos, potencialmente».
languages.original_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."

traits.locale_text: «El mon-keigh de hierro y su aparato inútil me han aburrido. Para demostrar mi maestría, lo reconstruiré con tanta minuciosidad que entenderá a cada segundo que pasa que su existencia es un privilegio que le puedo arrebatar. Un placer mucho más exquisito para mí que sus patéticos gimoteos, potencialmente».

languages.text: "Şu demir mon-keigh ve işe yaramaz ıvır zıvırı can sıkmaya başladı. Ustalığımı kanıtlamak için onu titiz, dayanılmaz bir dikkatle yeniden bir araya getireceğim ki varoluşunun, istediğim anda geri alabileceğim bir ayrıcalık olduğunu anlasın. Muhtemelen benim için onun acınası sızlanmalarından çok daha büyük bir zevk olacak."
languages.original_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."

traits.locale_text: "Şu demir mon-keigh ve işe yaramaz ıvır zıvırı can sıkmaya başladı. Ustalığımı kanıtlamak için onu titiz, dayanılmaz bir dikkatle yeniden bir araya getireceğim ki varoluşunun, istediğim anda geri alabileceğim bir ayrıcalık olduğunu anlasın. Muhtemelen benim için onun acınası sızlanmalarından çok daha büyük bir zevk olacak."

languages.text: “那个铁壳猴子和他那破玩意已经让我厌烦了。为了证明我的高超技艺，我会用最精细、最折磨人的手法把他一点点拼回去，好叫他时刻牢记，他的存在不过是我随时可以收回的恩赐。说不定，这比他那可怜兮兮的哀嚎更让我愉悦。”
languages.original_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."

traits.locale_text: “那个铁壳猴子和他那破玩意已经让我厌烦了。为了证明我的高超技艺，我会用最精细、最折磨人的手法把他一点点拼回去，好叫他时刻牢记，他的存在不过是我随时可以收回的恩赐。说不定，这比他那可怜兮兮的哀嚎更让我愉悦。”

languages.text: 「その鉄の怪物と彼の役に立たない小道具は、もう飽きた。私の支配力を示すために、私は彼を細心の注意と苦痛をもって組み立て直す。そうすれば、彼は毎秒、自分の存在は私が取り消せる特権であることを理解するだろう。彼の哀れな泣きじゃくるよりも、私にとってはるかに優れた快楽になるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "That iron mon-keigh and his useless trinket have grown tedious. To prove my mastery, I will piece him back together with meticulous, excruciating attention so that, every second, he understands his existence is a privilege I can revoke. Potentially a far more exquisite pleasure for me than any of his pathetic snivelling."
